But then the last part is like, once you start to rank organically and people start to click on it, you're expanding your retargeting pool.
And so what that means is like, when someone is searching for a really expensive term,
In paid search, you can do bid modifiers if it's retargeting.
So that means like if they already visited your site, you're willing to pay an extra buck or two on that click if they're searching for a really expensive term.
But then maybe you're like don't want to bid on it at all if they're a cold audience because it's just not worth a click, right?
